title: lobanilia ovalis
intro: Lobanilia ovalis is a type of flowering plant, also known as the 'oval-leaf lobelia', that belongs to the Lobeliaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Lobanilia ovalis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Lobanilia ovalis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched.
